STYLE_GUIDE.md.summary: Markdown style guide defining shadcn-inspired UI rules, forbidding gradients, and giving implementation hints for the coding agent.

index.html.summary: Full Crowdcode landing page updated to align with a cleaner, shadcn-inspired presentation while preserving the existing structure and content.

script.js.summary: JavaScript celebration effect updated to avoid gradients and use solid shadcn-like neutral colors for the button state changes and particles.

styles.css.summary: Styles rewritten to remove gradients and shift the demo toward a cleaner shadcn-inspired neutral palette with subtle borders and shadows.
